CREATE TABLE test_dict (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data_dict JSON);
SELECT dict_list_keys(data_dict) FROM test_dict WHERE id = 1;
SELECT dict_list_keys(data_dict) FROM test_dict WHERE id = 2;
SELECT dict_list_keys(data_dict) FROM (SELECT data_dict FROM test_dict WHERE id = 1) AS subquery;
SELECT d.id, dict_list_keys(d.data_dict) FROM test_dict d INNER JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_dict WHERE id > 0) as ids ON d.id = ids.id;
SELECT id, dict_list_keys(data_dict) AS keys_list FROM test_dict WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_dict WHERE data_dict IS NOT NULL);
SELECT dict_list_keys(data_dict) FROM test_dict WHERE id = 3 AND data_dict IS NOT NULL;
SELECT dict_list_keys(data_dict) AS keys FROM (SELECT data_dict FROM test_dict WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3)) AS combined;
SELECT dict_list_keys(data_dict) AS keys FROM test_dict WHERE data_dict IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT dict_list_keys(data_dict) FROM test_dict WHERE id = 4;
SELECT d.id, dict_list_keys(d.data_dict) FROM ((SELECT id, data_dict FROM test_dict WHERE id = 1) AS d) UNION (SELECT id, dict_list_keys(data_dict) FROM test_dict WHERE id = 2);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_dict AS SELECT dict_list_keys(data_dict) AS keys_list FROM test_dict;
